message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings breaking CI (suboptimal_flops, missing_const_for_fn)

Use mul_add for fused multiply-add in linear regression, and allow
missing_const_for_fn on codexbar_token_accounts_file since it cannot be
const on macOS despite being const-eligible on other platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
